vulnerabilities_fixed.description: RSA key generation verified - test helper already uses proper 2048-bit keys from crypto/rsa
vulnerabilities_fixed.fix: generateTestRSAKey() uses rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048) which is secure

vulnerabilities_fixed.description: Path traversal validation added to policy file operations
vulnerabilities_fixed.fix: Added validatePolicyName() function with regex validation and path traversal checks in LoadPolicyFromFile

vulnerabilities_fixed.description: IDOR vulnerabilities fixed with proper authorization checks
vulnerabilities_fixed.fix: Added role-based authorization to all handlers using c.Query('user_id') - only admins can access other users' data
Changed to single Lock() pattern with defer Unlock() to prevent race conditions

vulnerabilities_fixed.description: SQL injection verified - all queries use proper parameterization
vulnerabilities_fixed.fix: All queries use pgx parameterized queries with $1, $2 placeholders - no string concatenation found

remaining_vulnerabilities.description: OTP code potentially exposed in API response
remaining_vulnerabilities.fix: Review needed for OTP exposure in responses
Implement CSRF middleware for state-changing operations

remaining_vulnerabilities.description: Audit logs tamper-evident logging implementation needed
remaining_vulnerabilities.fix: Implement cryptographic chaining or digital signatures on audit entries

owasp_checks.detail: IDOR vulnerabilities fixed with role-based authorization checks
RSA key generation verified as using proper 2048-bit keys
All SQL queries verified as using parameterized queries with pgx
Path traversal validation added to policy operations
Proper logging and structured config observed
MFA implemented with proper authorization checks

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 - Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.detail: Audit integrity checks present - tamper evidence could be improved

owasp_checks.category: A09:2021 - Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

fixes_applied: 1. Verified RSA key generation uses proper 2048-bit keys
2. Added path traversal validation to policy.go with validatePolicyName() function
3. Fixed IDOR vulnerabilities in handlers_risk.go, handlers_advanced_mfa.go, and service.go with role-based checks
4. Fixed thread-safety issue in rateLimitStore with proper Lock() pattern
5. Verified all SQL queries use parameterized queries
test_results: PASS - All Go tests passed successfully
